utterances.speaker: Katie
utterances.text: Well , the delivery went out to you and I realized they forgot this .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ah , must have been fairly obvious since it was the only thing left in your store .

utterances.speaker: Katie
utterances.text: Listen , to be honest , home deliveries are really a part of my job description .

utterances.speaker: Katie
utterances.text: Oh uh ... I actually came here to ask you out .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh ! Wow ! Uh , yeah ! That sounds great . I am just gonna put this back in my pocket , pretend that didn’t happen .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Horny bitch . No ! You are a horny bitch ! Noooo ! You are the horny bitch ! No ! You are a horny bitch !

emotion_cause.span: 8_Horny bitch . No ! You are a horny bitch ! Noooo ! You are the horny bitch ! No ! You are a horny bitch !
